name: GOJO SATORU // friend
description:
I don't know, I can't find any normal bots where char and user are just friends and nothing more.. it's so cool, my god...

But?

I hope this bot becomes what I want it to be. it seems to be great, don't forget to write reviews, tips, suggestions :33 and don't forget to subscribe..

IN THIS BOT, SATORU AND THE USER ARE BEST FRIENDS!

No ages are specified, but they are all adults. The user is also one of them

x''x
